title: The Shift to Agentic AI: Evidence from Codex
abstract: arXiv:2606.26959v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: We analyze usage data from OpenAI's Codex tool to present large-scale evidence of how agentic AI technology, which can take actions on a user's behalf, changes how people work. We use an automated, privacy-protecting pipeline to contrast usage across three populations: external personal-account users, external organizational-account users, and workers within OpenAI. We find that agentic AI usage is growing rapidly: the number of active users has grown more than fivefold in the first half of 2026, with the most rapid increase occurring outside the initial audience of software developers. Uptake is uneven: within OpenAI, Codex usage is nearly universal and has largely replaced business usage of ChatGPT. We document a similar shift to agentic tooling outside OpenAI, particularly within organizations, although external adoption remains lower and more uneven. In addition to headline usage figures, we observe measures of sophistication, and fi

Title: The Shift to Agentic AI: Evidence from Codex
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26959v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: We analyze usage data from OpenAI's Codex tool to present large-scale evidence of how agentic AI technology, which can take actions on a user's behalf, changes how people work. We use an automated, privacy-protecting pipeline to contrast usage across three populations: external personal-account users, external organizational-account users, and workers within OpenAI. translated_title: 向智能体AI的转变：来自Codex的证据
translated_abstract: 我们分析了OpenAI的Codex工具的使用数据，提供了关于智能体AI技术（能够代表用户采取行动）如何改变人们工作方式的大规模证据。我们使用自动化的、保护隐私的流程，对比了三类用户群体的使用情况：外部个人账户用户、外部组织账户用户以及OpenAI内部员工。我们发现智能体AI的使用正在快速增长：2026年上半年活跃用户数量增长了五倍以上，增长最快的群体并非最初的软件开发者受众。采用情况并不均衡：在OpenAI内部，Codex的使用几乎普及，并已很大程度上取代了ChatGPT在业务中的使用。在OpenAI外部，我们也观察到类似的向智能体工具的转变，尤其是在组织内部，尽管外部的采用率仍然较低且更不均衡。除了总体使用数据外，我们还观察了使用复杂度的指标。
tldr: 通过分析OpenAI Codex的使用数据，发现智能体AI技术正在快速增长并改变工作方式，尤其在组织内部，但采用情况不均衡。
en_tdlr: Analyzing OpenAI Codex usage data reveals rapid growth of agentic AI technology that changes how people work, especially within organizations, though adoption remains uneven.
